top_stories.description: Major AI healthcare stories with strategic analysis, split into act_now and watch_this. MUST have a clear AI or technology angle. Produce 3-5 items.

vbc_watch.description: Stories where AI intersects with value-based care, payment models, risk adjustment, quality measures. MUST have an AI or technology component. If no AI-related VBC stories this week, produce fewer items. Do NOT pad with non-AI healthcare news.

ma_partnerships.label: M&A & Partnerships
ma_partnerships.description: Acquisitions, funding rounds, and partnerships that involve AI, health tech, or digital health. MUST have an AI or technology angle. A hospital buying another hospital is NOT relevant. A company acquiring an AI startup IS relevant. If no AI-related deals this week, produce fewer items or skip the section.

consulting_intelligence.label: Consulting Intelligence
consulting_intelligence.description: Activity at the AI-in-consulting layer for healthcare. Two qualifying patterns: (a) tracked consulting firm activity — practice launches, AI investments, strategic hires, AI-related partnerships, acquisitions of AI companies BY tracked firms; (b) competitive entrants to that layer — model labs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, etc.), hyperscalers, or PE-backed JVs launching AI services / consulting / implementation / advisory firms aimed at enterprise or regulated industries. Pattern (b) belongs here even when the announcement does not name healthcare directly — these JVs and services firms compete with the tracked consultancies for healthcare-system AI spend. MUST involve AI or technology. If no qualifying news this week, skip this section entirely.

did_you_know.description: General AI capability and release news. Educational tone. These are the ONLY items that don't need a healthcare angle, but they MUST be about AI. Always exactly 2.

global_rules: EVERY STORY IN EVERY SECTION MUST HAVE AN AI OR TECHNOLOGY ANGLE. This is an AI newsletter. No exceptions. If a story doesn't involve AI, machine learning, automation, digital health, or health tech, it does not belong here regardless of how big the news is.
At least one story must include a risk_angle or contrarian take
At least one top_story must have priority act_now
Every story needs a so_what that answers: why should a health system exec care about this AI development?
Connect related stories via the connections field when applicable
Include a linkedin_seed with the single most compelling story for a LinkedIn post
Sections with min_count 0 should be omitted entirely if no qualifying stories exist. Do NOT pad sections with irrelevant content to meet a count.
